gaps: 🧠 LIFECYCLE DIMENSION — Blinking vs. Locked: The bug reports that CCL settings 'blink' instead of being properly locked/greyed out during an active call. Test case 65641606 covers that CCL settings should be 'locked and greyed out during an active call, with a dialog preventing adjustment until the call ends.' However, the bug specifically describes a 'blinking' visual behavior — this is a UI rendering defect (rapid toggling between locked/unlocked states) that is NOT covered by a simple 'are they greyed out?' check. The existing test does not validate the STABILITY of the locked state (i.e., that the UI does not flicker/blink).

🧠 STATE TRIGGER — Timing of state lock: The bug implies the CCL lock state might be toggling rapidly (blinking) due to a race condition between call state updates and UI rendering. The existing test (65641606) likely checks the final steady state but does not test the TRANSITION into the locked state — e.g., does the UI briefly show unlocked before locking? Does it flicker during call initiation/termination? No test covers the moment WHEN the call starts and the lock is applied.

🧠 LIFECYCLE DIMENSION — Call state transitions: No test covers CCL behavior during: (a) incoming call vs. outgoing call initiation, (b) call waiting / second incoming call, (c) call hold/resume, (d) call transfer. The blinking could be specific to one of these sub-states.

🧠 DEVICE ASYMMETRY — The bug scenario does not specify a device, but CCL (Call Control Layer / Conversation Clarity Limiter) is a feature that may behave differently across Poly devices (e.g., Sync 20, Voyager series, Surround 80). The existing tests do not validate CCL locking behavior across different Poly device types.

🧠 LIFECYCLE DIMENSION — App lifecycle during call: No test covers what happens to CCL locked state when the app is backgrounded during a call and then reopened. Does the blinking occur on re-entry? Does the lock persist correctly after app kill/relaunch while call is still active?

generated_testcases.title: CCL Lock Stability — No UI Flicker/Blinking During Active Call (Steady State)
steps: Precondition: Device connected (e.g., Voyager Free 60+). Navigate to: Device → Audio Settings → CCL.
Verify CCL settings are interactive (not locked) — no call active.
Initiate an outgoing call from the phone dialer.
Immediately observe the CCL settings UI for 5 continuous seconds.
Navigate to: Device → Audio Settings → CCL.
Observe the CCL toggle and any sub-settings continuously for 10 seconds.
generated_testcases.expected: Expected: CCL toggle and all sub-settings appear greyed out/locked immediately upon call connection and remain STABLE (no flicker, no blinking, no rapid toggling between locked/unlocked states) for the entire observation period. Actual (If Bug): CCL settings blink/rapidly toggle between locked and unlocked states during the call.

generated_testcases.title: CCL Lock Transition — Outgoing Call Initiation (No Flicker During Lock Application)
steps: Precondition: Device connected. Navigate to: Device → Audio Settings → CCL. Note initial state (unlocked).
Start screen recording on the phone (or use continuous visual observation).
Initiate an outgoing call from the phone dialer.
Observe the CCL settings UI continuously from the moment the call starts until 3 seconds after the call is fully connected.
Stop screen recording.
generated_testcases.expected: Expected: CCL settings transition from unlocked to locked state exactly once, cleanly, without any intermediate unlocked flash or flicker. The lock applies within 1 second of call connection and remains stable. Actual (If Bug): CCL settings briefly show unlocked state after call connection, or flicker/blink multiple times before settling into locked state.

generated_testcases.title: CCL Lock Transition — Incoming Call Answer (No Flicker During Lock Application)
steps: Precondition: Device connected. Navigate to: Device → Audio Settings → CCL. Note initial state (unlocked).
Start screen recording.
Have a second phone call the test device. Answer the incoming call.
Observe the CCL settings UI continuously from the moment the call rings through answer + 3 seconds.
Stop screen recording.
generated_testcases.expected: Expected: CCL settings transition from unlocked to locked state exactly once upon answering the call, without flicker or intermediate unlocked flash. Actual (If Bug): CCL settings blink during the ringing-to-connected transition, or show unlocked state briefly after answering before locking.

generated_testcases.title: CCL Lock During Call Waiting — Second Incoming Call
steps: Precondition: Device connected. Establish an active call (Call A). Navigate to: Device → Audio Settings → CCL. Verify CCL is locked and stable.
While Call A is active, have a second phone call the test device (Call B incoming, call waiting tone heard).
Observe CCL settings continuously for 5 seconds during the call waiting alert.
Put Call A on hold and answer Call B.
Observe CCL settings continuously for 5 seconds after switching calls.
Swap back to Call A (hold Call B).
Observe CCL settings continuously for 5 seconds.
generated_testcases.expected: Expected: CCL settings remain locked and stable (no flicker/blinking) throughout all call waiting transitions — during the incoming call alert, after answering Call B, and when swapping between calls. The locked state is never interrupted. Actual (If Bug): CCL settings blink or briefly become unlocked during call waiting alert or call swap transitions.

generated_testcases.title: CCL Lock During Call Hold/Resume
steps: Precondition: Device connected. Establish an active call. Navigate to: Device → Audio Settings → CCL. Verify CCL is locked and stable.
Put the active call on hold.
Observe CCL settings continuously for 5 seconds during hold state.
Resume the call.
Observe CCL settings continuously for 5 seconds after resume.
generated_testcases.expected: Expected: CCL settings remain locked and stable (no flicker/blinking) during both hold and resume states. The lock persists regardless of call hold status. Actual (If Bug): CCL settings blink or become unlocked during hold state, or flicker during the hold-to-resume transition.

generated_testcases.title: CCL Lock During Call Transfer (Bluetooth Handoff Between Devices)
steps: Precondition: Device connected (e.g., Voyager Free 60+). Establish an active call. Navigate to: Device → Audio Settings → CCL. Verify CCL is locked and stable.
Transfer the audio from the headset to the phone handset (using phone's audio source selector).
Observe CCL settings continuously for 5 seconds after transfer.
Transfer the audio back to the headset.
Observe CCL settings continuously for 5 seconds after transfer back.
generated_testcases.expected: Expected: CCL settings remain locked and stable (no flicker/blinking) during and after audio transfer to phone and back to headset. The lock is tied to the call being active on the device, not to audio routing. Actual (If Bug): CCL settings blink or become unlocked momentarily during audio transfer transitions.

generated_testcases.title: CCL Lock Persistence — App Backgrounded During Active Call
steps: Precondition: Device connected. Establish an active call. Navigate to: Device → Audio Settings → CCL. Verify CCL is locked and stable.
Press Home button to background the app.
Wait 10 seconds.
Reopen the app from the recent apps list.
Navigate to: Device → Audio Settings → CCL.
Observe CCL settings continuously for 10 seconds.
generated_testcases.expected: Expected: CCL settings remain locked and stable (no flicker/blinking) upon re-entering the app. The locked state persists correctly through app backgrounding and foregrounding. Actual (If Bug): CCL settings blink or show unlocked state briefly upon app re-entry before locking.

generated_testcases.title: CCL Lock Persistence — App Force-Kill and Relaunch During Active Call
steps: Precondition: Device connected. Establish an active call. Navigate to: Device → Audio Settings → CCL. Verify CCL is locked and stable.
Force-kill the app (swipe from recent apps).
Wait 5 seconds.
Relaunch the app and reconnect to the device.
Navigate to: Device → Audio Settings → CCL.
Observe CCL settings continuously for 10 seconds.
generated_testcases.expected: Expected: CCL settings are locked and stable (no flicker/blinking) upon app relaunch while call is still active. The app correctly reads the call state from the device and applies the lock. Actual (If Bug): CCL settings initially appear unlocked or blink before locking, indicating a race condition in call state retrieval on app startup.

generated_testcases.title: CCL Lock Stability — Rapid Call Start/End Cycles
steps: Precondition: Device connected. Navigate to: Device → Audio Settings → CCL.
Start screen recording.
Initiate a call, wait 2 seconds, end the call.
Immediately initiate another call, wait 2 seconds, end the call.
Repeat rapid call start/end cycle 5 times total.
Observe CCL settings continuously during all transitions.
Stop screen recording.
generated_testcases.expected: Expected: CCL settings lock cleanly during each call and unlock cleanly after each call ends. No flicker, blinking, or residual lock state across cycles. The UI state transitions exactly once per call start and once per call end. Actual (If Bug): CCL settings blink during rapid transitions, or the lock/unlock state becomes desynchronized (e.g., remains locked after call ends or becomes unlocked during a call).

generated_testcases.title: CCL Lock — Device Asymmetry: Sync 20 vs. Voyager Free 60+ vs. Surround 80
steps: Precondition: Test device = Poly Sync 20. Connect and pair.
Establish an active call. Navigate to: Device → Audio Settings → CCL.
Observe CCL settings continuously for 10 seconds. Note any flicker/blinking.
End the call. Disconnect Sync 20.
Precondition: Test device = Voyager Free 60+. Connect and pair.
Establish an active call. Navigate to: Device → Audio Settings → CCL.
Observe CCL settings continuously for 10 seconds. Note any flicker/blinking.
End the call. Disconnect Voyager Free 60+.
Precondition: Test device = Poly Surround 80. Connect and pair.
Establish an active call. Navigate to: Device → Audio Settings → CCL.
Observe CCL settings continuously for 10 seconds. Note any flicker/blinking.
End the call.
generated_testcases.expected: Expected: CCL settings remain locked and stable (no flicker/blinking) on ALL three device types during an active call. The locking behavior is consistent across Sync 20, Voyager Free 60+, and Surround 80. Actual (If Bug): One or more device types exhibit CCL blinking/flickering while others do not — indicating device-specific race condition in CCL lock implementation.

generated_testcases.title: CCL Lock — Immediate State Trigger: Change CCL Setting and Immediately Start Call
steps: Precondition: Device connected. Navigate to: Device → Audio Settings → CCL.
Set CCL to ON (if available) or adjust a CCL sub-setting.
IMMEDIATELY (within 1 second) initiate an outgoing call from the phone dialer WITHOUT navigating away from the CCL screen.
Observe CCL settings continuously for 10 seconds during the call.
generated_testcases.expected: Expected: CCL settings lock cleanly and immediately upon call connection, regardless of whether a CCL change was just made. No flicker, no blinking, no race condition between the setting change and the lock application. The last CCL value set before the call persists. Actual (If Bug): CCL settings blink or the recently changed value is lost/reset during the lock transition.

generated_testcases.title: CCL Lock — Call End Transition (Lock Releases Cleanly)
steps: Precondition: Device connected. Establish an active call. Navigate to: Device → Audio Settings → CCL. Verify CCL is locked and stable.
Start screen recording.
End the call from the phone dialer.
Observe CCL settings continuously from call end until 5 seconds after.
Stop screen recording.
Interact with CCL settings (toggle or adjust).
generated_testcases.expected: Expected: CCL settings transition from locked to unlocked state exactly once, cleanly, without flicker. Settings become interactive immediately after call ends. No residual lock state. Actual (If Bug): CCL settings blink during call end transition, or remain locked for a period after call ends, or briefly flash locked/unlocked multiple times before settling to unlocked.
